hook: Progress shows up first as reduced panic, not as instant charisma.
body: The early signs of growth are often quieter than people expect: less avoidance, faster recovery, more eye contact, cleaner tone.

hook: If you only look for movie-level confidence, you will miss the real gains that are actually happening.
body: Small nervous-system wins are not side notes; they are the foundation.

hook: Small nervous-system wins are not side notes; they are the foundation.
body: Needing less time to recover after an awkward moment is often a bigger milestone than landing a perfect line.

body: Track subtle improvements weekly so your brain learns to recognize evidence instead of only demanding dramatic success.
